title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Critically acclaimed with an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127K votes and an 87 Metacritic score. Created by Vince Gilligan and stars Rhea Seehorn, both known for 'Better Call Saul,' on the prestigious Apple TV+.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: Features a strong ensemble cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal, and has garnered a significant 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65K votes on Netflix, indicating broad appeal and engagement.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.
reason: Led by Emmy-winning actress Sarah Snook, this show has a strong 7.5 IMDb rating from nearly 40K votes, demonstrating both critical and audience appreciation.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: Stars acclaimed actors Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys, achieving a solid 7.4 IMDb rating from over 61K votes, showcasing significant audience engagement on Netflix.
